{"step_by_step_thinking": "Based on the information provided in the documents, synarthroses are immovable joints where collagenous fibrous connective tissue unites two bones. Sutures, gomphoses, and syndesmoses are all examples of synarthroses. Sutures are fibrous joints between the bones of the skull, gomphoses are fibrous joints that anchor teeth in the jawbone, and syndesmoses are fibrous joints that connect the tibia and fibula in the leg. Therefore, all three options (sutures, gomphosis, and syndesmosis) are examples of synarthroses.", "answer_choice": "D"}
